---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for SqlGraph
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> For significant features, please open this issue (or a discussion) **before**
> writing code so we can align on scope. See
> [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#suggesting-a-feature-or-enhancement).

## What feature would you like to see?

A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Why do you need it? (use case)

The problem this solves or the workflow it enables.

## How should it work?

Your idea of the desired behavior, API, or output. Include example SQL and the
graph you'd expect, if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the request.
